import subprocess, sys
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w - - 0 1'
engine = subprocess.Popen(['/usr/games/stockfish'], stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)

def cmd(s):
    engine.stdin.write(s+'\n')
    engine.stdin.flush()

def read_until(prefixes):
    out=[]
    while True:
        line=engine.stdout.readline().strip()
        out.append(line)
        if any(line.startswith(p) for p in prefixes):
            return out

cmd('uci')
read_until(['uciok'])
cmd('isready')
read_until(['readyok'])
cmd(f'position fen {fen}')
cmd('go movetime 3000')
lines = read_until(['bestmove'])
print('\n'.join(lines[-20:]))
cmd('quit')

import subprocess
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1'
engine = subprocess.Popen(['/usr/games/stockfish'], stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)

def cmd(s):
    engine.stdin.write(s+'\n')
    engine.stdin.flush()

def wait(token):
    out=[]
    while True:
        line = engine.stdout.readline().strip()
        if not line:
            continue
        out.append(line)
        if line.startswith(token):
            return out

cmd('uci')
wait('uciok')
cmd('setoption name MultiPV value 20')
cmd('isready')
wait('readyok')
cmd(f'position fen {fen}')
cmd('go depth 6')
lines = wait('bestmove')
for line in lines:
    if ' score mate 1 ' in line or line.startswith('bestmove'):
        print(line)
cmd('quit')

import chess
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w KQ - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
print(board)
print('legal?', board.is_valid())
print('check?', board.is_check())
for mv in ['g2g4','e2e4']:
    m = chess.Move.from_uci(mv)
    print(mv, m in board.legal_moves)
    if m in board.legal_moves:
        b = board.copy()
        b.push(m)
        print(' after checkmate?', b.is_checkmate(), 'check?', b.is_check())
        print(b)
        print()

import chess
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w - - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
mates = []
for move in board.legal_moves:
    b = board.copy()
    b.push(move)
    if b.is_checkmate():
        mates.append(move.uci())
print('\n'.join(mates))

g2g4

print('valid', board.is_valid())
print('\n'.join(m.uci() for m in board.legal_moves if (lambda b:(b.push(m), b.is_checkmate())[1])(board.copy())))

import chess, pathlib, re
fen = 'r1bq1r2/1p3pp1/p1n1p3/3nPkbP/8/P1N5/1P2QPP1/R1B1K2R w - - 0 1'
board = chess.Board(fen)
path = pathlib.Path('/app/move.txt')
text = path.read_text().strip().splitlines()
print('exists', path.exists())
print('lines', text)
print('format_ok', all(re.fullmatch(r'[a-h][1-8][a-h][1-8][qrbn]?', line) for line in text))
for line in text:
    move = chess.Move.from_uci(line)
    print(line, 'legal', move in board.legal_moves)
    b = board.copy()
    b.push(move)
    print(line, 'checkmate', b.is_checkmate())
